Dr. Sabiha Bunek, DDS
Founder · DENTAL ADVISOR · Ann Arbor, Michigan
Why Independence Matters
"The moment you let advertisers influence your findings, you stop being research and start being marketing. We've never crossed that line in 40 years, and we never will."

DENTAL ADVISOR was founded on a simple belief: that dental professionals deserve access to honest, unbiased product research — not manufacturer-funded claims dressed up as science.

Every evaluation we publish is conducted by practicing clinicians. Every rating reflects real clinical performance. No sponsor has ever influenced our findings.

Be the First to Evaluate New Dental Products

DENTAL ADVISOR connects clinicians with manufacturers to test products before they reach the market.
